claim_support.reason: All material claims in the report are supported by the authoritative cited chunk IDs and calculation IDs provided in the evidence pack. Financial figures, company details, and news developments match the linked evidence.

numerical_accuracy.reason: All numerical claims (revenue, margins, growth rates, balance sheet items) match the provided evidence chunks and calculation objects exactly. Calculations such as YoY growth and margins are internally consistent with the source data.

citation_precision.reason: The authoritative cited chunk IDs listed under each paragraph correctly correspond to the evidence blocks provided. There are no mismatches between the cited IDs and the content they support.

temporal_validity.reason: All data periods (e.g., Q2 FY2026 ending Dec 31, 2025) are prior to the report As-of date (Jan 26, 2026). No post-as-of data periods are used, although the release status of the data is contradictory (see Consistency).

consistency.reason: Severe internal contradiction regarding the status of Q2 FY2026 financial data. Financial Analysis Paragraph 1 states results as 'demonstrated' and 'reaching' (implying actuals), while Financial Analysis Paragraph 2 labels them 'estimated figures', and Recent Developments Paragraph 2 states earnings are 'scheduled to release... on January 28, 2026' (future relative to As-of). This contradiction affects the certainty of the investment thesis.

financial_numeric.reason: Skipped because the report failed the Accuracy Gate due to severe inconsistencies.
